raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "declaring an ongoing behavioral commitment to self-monitoring and accountability",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "wrongs or errors have occurred and will continue to occur",
    "personal inventory is a repeatable, valuable practice",
    "prompt admission of error is both feasible and preferable to delay or denial",
    "the speaker/group has the capacity and intention to sustain this practice"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a description of a continuous feedback loop between observation and corrective action",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the commitment must be enacted regularly, the inventory must be honest rather than self-serving, and admission must produce observable behavioral change",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is issued without genuine intention or mechanism for follow-through, or 'we' is invoked to imply collective adherence that does not exist"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: declaring an ongoing behavioral commitment to self-monitoring and accountability
implicit_claims: wrongs or errors have occurred and will continue to occur

prompt admission of error is both feasible and preferable to delay or denial
the speaker/group has the capacity and intention to sustain this practice
